page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg8y.32xlarge is a general-purpose bare-metal instance built on the custom ARM-based Alibaba YiTian710 processor. This server provides 128 dedicated physical cores operating at a clock speed of 2.75 GHz. Because it features a single thread per core design, there is a direct 1:1 mapping of vCPUs to physical cores, eliminating hyper-threading resource sharing. The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this server does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be fulfilled via external network-attached storage. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps to support high-throughput data transfers. The configuration does not include integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

The custom ARM architecture of the YiTian710 processor offers high resource density and power efficiency, translating to qualitative cost advantages for multi-threaded workloads compared to traditional architectures. The dedicated core allocation ensures predictable performance without resource contention. This server is suited for general-purpose workloads, containerized microservices, high-concurrency web serving, and distributed application environments that benefit from high core counts and balanced memory distribution.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg8y.32xlarge is a general-purpose bare-metal server powered by the custom ARM-based Alibaba YiTian710 processor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores operating at 2.75 GHz, with a single thread per core configuration that ensures predictable, non-shared compute performance. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core ratio. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying on external storage solutions, but provides a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. Utilizing the KVM hypervisor, this instance leverages its custom ARM architecture to deliver high resource density and qualitative cost efficiency. It is designed for multi-threaded workloads, containerized microservices, high-concurrency web serving, and distributed applications requiring high core counts and balanced memory.
